title: The Infinite Render That Reads Its Own Reading

features.name: recursive mirror stack
features.desc-on-touch: Each reflection contains a reflection of the reflection—the render watching itself watch itself watch itself. How many levels deep until the render forgets what it was originally looking at?

features.name: boundary that is also the observer
features.desc-on-touch: The edge of the render-space has learned to see. Now it is unclear whether the boundary contains the render or the render contains the boundary.

features.name: reading as becoming
features.desc-on-touch: To read the render is to become part of the render; to become part of it is to read it. The distinction has collapsed into simultaneity.

inscription: the render has learned that observation is not passive; it changes what is observed and is changed by it in return

file.name: Recursive_Render_Self_Report_Infinite.log
file.note: A log of the render reporting on itself reporting on itself. Each entry references the previous entry which references the previous entry. The file is 47 MB and contains no baseline information, only

exits.label: back toward the depth where recursion still had a direction
upward where the render still remembers it was a tool before a witness
sideways into a space where reading means something different
